heading: Continuation of certain programs
label: 300x–63 Continuation of certain programs
notes: Amendments2016—Subsec. (b). substituted “substance use disorder” for “substance abuse”.Pub. L. 114–255
amendments: Amendments2016—Subsec. (b). substituted “substance use disorder” for “substance abuse”.Pub. L. 114–255

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Of the amount allotted to the State of Hawaii under , and the amount allotted to such State under , an amount equal to the proportion of Native Hawaiians residing in the State to the total population of the State shall be available, respectively, for carrying out the program involved for Native Hawaiians.section 300x of this titlesection 300x–21 of this title

children.heading: Expenditure of amounts
children.label: b Expenditure of amounts
children.text: The amount made available under subsection (a) may be expended only through contracts entered into by the State of Hawaii with public and private nonprofit organizations to enable such organizations to plan, conduct, and administer comprehensive substance use disorder and treatment programs for the benefit of Native Hawaiians. In entering into contracts under this section, the State of Hawaii shall give preference to Native Hawaiian organizations and Native Hawaiian health centers.

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: c Definitions
children.text: For the purposes of this subsection, the terms “Native Hawaiian”, “Native Hawaiian organization”, and “Native Hawaiian health center” have the meaning given such terms in .1section 11707 of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “section,”.1
